summary: Iteration 18 - Major UI Refactor Testing Complete. All features verified: Welcome page (hero+carousel+chi siamo+CTA+footer), Login page (centered form with geometric H logo), Register page (all fields+client type selector), Sidebar navigation (3 items+collapse+user menu), Dashboard (critical alert+actions+reminder carousel+practice table+activity log), Practices List (table+search+filters+delete dialog), Practice Detail (2-column layout with all panels). Navigation between all pages works correctly. All UI text in Italian.

issues: Some data-testid attributes missing on dashboard-page, sidebar, nav-dashboard, quick-actions, create-practice-btn, quick-email-btn, practice-table, activity-log - these elements exist but don't have the expected data-testid

action_items: Consider adding missing data-testid attributes to Dashboard page elements for better testability (optional, not blocking)
critical_code_review_comments: All pages properly use the new color system (#FBFBFB, #E8F9FF, #C4D9FF, #C5BAFF)
Geometric H logo (HerionMark) renders correctly with gradient
Cookie-based JWT auth working correctly with httpOnly cookies
All UI text properly in Italian
2-column layout on Practice Detail page well-implemented
Collapsible sidebar and agent pipeline working correctly
API service properly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested the major UI refactor. All pages verified working: (1) Welcome page: hero section with HERION watermark, carousel with prev/next navigation, chi siamo section, value proposition cards, stats section, CTA section, footer. (2) Login page: centered form with geometric H logo, email/password fields, forgot password link, submit button, register link. (3) Register page: all form fields present (personal info, residence, client type selector, fiscal data, password, consent checkboxes). (4) Sidebar: 3 nav items (Dashboard, Pratiche, Comunicazione), collapse/expand toggle, user menu with logout. (5) Dashboard: critical alert banner with count, Nuova Pratica + Comunicazione buttons, reminder banner carousel, practice table with Nome/Stato/Azione columns, critical practices block, activity log. (6) Practices List: table with search, status/type filters, delete dialog. (7) Practice Detail: 2-column layout - left (status timeline, collapsible agent pipeline, documents, agent logs), right (blockers panel, AI suggestions, chat, timeline, collapsed activity log). (8) Navigation: all routes work correctly including logout flow.

details: CTA section with Inizia ora button
Centered form with geometric H logo
Critical alert banner with count (7 pratiche richiedono attenzione)
Agent activity panel with expandable logs
Welcome: Meno confusione, Piu controllo, Chi siamo, Inizia ora
Register: Crea il tuo account, Informazioni Personali, Residenza, Tipo di Cliente, Dati Fiscali, Sicurezza
